series_metadata.series_title: Inventory Management Reports and Form Files
series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of all inventory reports and forms including surplus certifications, physical certifications, online auction documentation, destruction / surplus forms, lost/missing forms, GASB 34 Asset Management Forms, transactional documentation, maintenance generated material documentation, transfer / donation pakcages and internal auditing / spotcheck countsheets and reports (i.e. Salt Transfers, Fuelt and Salt Projections, Fuel Receipts, Exception Reports). This includes data related to ELLIS, WRAP, EIMS, FARS and AA.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Maintain permanently. ; Paper: paper documents converted into scanned electronic form
